summary: Excellent soundboard capture of an unforgettable show highlighted by Black Peter, Ship of Fools and Dire Wolf.
review: The recording delivers crystal‑clear soundboard fidelity that fans describe as both ‘chunky’ and sweet, while the performance shines with a standout Black Peter, a sparkling Ship of Fools and a powerful Dire Wolf. Reviewers rave about Jerry’s soaring guitar work and the overall high‑energy flow of the set, making this April ’78 show one of the year’s peaks.

ai_rating.rationale: All three reviews are highly positive (5, 5, 4 stars) and praise both the musical performance and recording quality; consistent enthusiasm across multiple reviewers yields a strong confidence level.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No complaints about drop‑outs or muddiness; reviewers note crisp, clear soundboard capture with pleasant tonal character.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers describe the show as sparkling and full of peaks, with a strong first set (Dire Wolf) and an especially memorable second‑set vibe.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Praised for wailing and great guitar tone throughout the performance.
